## Checklist

Please confirm each item before submitting:

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The entry has a working URL (I tested it today)
- [ ] The entry has an OSS license (MIT, Apache 2.0, BSD, or similar)
- [ ] The project's last commit was within the last 12 months
- [ ] I wrote the description myself (not copied from the project's README or tagline)
- [ ] I have added the correct tags from the [tag taxonomy](../CONTRIBUTING.md#tag-taxonomy)
- [ ] This is not a duplicate of an existing entry
- [ ] If this is my own project, I have disclosed that below

## Self-promotion disclosure

<!-- If you are a maintainer or contributor of the project you're submitting, disclose it here. This is allowed and encouraged — undisclosed self-promotion is not. -->

- [ ] This is my own project / I am a contributor to this project
- [ ] This is NOT my own project
